title: Beyond Relevance: On the Relationship Between Retrieval and RAG Information Coverage
abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems combine document retrieval with a generative model to address complex information seeking tasks like report generation. While the relationship between retrieval quality and generation effectiveness seems intuitive, it has not been systematically studied. We investigate whether upstream retrieval metrics can serve as reliable early indicators of the final generated response's information coverage. Through experiments across two text RAG benchmarks (TREC NeuCLIR 2024 and TREC RAG 2024) and one multimodal benchmark (WikiVideo), we analyze 15 text retrieval stacks and 10 multimodal retrieval stacks across four RAG pipelines and multiple evaluation frameworks (Auto-ARGUE and MiRAGE). Our findings demonstrate strong correlations between coverage-based retrieval metrics and nugget coverage in generated responses at both topic and system levels. This relationship holds most strongly when retrieval objectives align with generation goals, though more complex iterative RAG pipelines can partially decouple generation quality from retrieval effectiveness. These findings provide empirical support for using retrieval metrics as proxies for RAG performance.

title: Biosensing technologies for foodborne pathogen detection and healthcare: principles, emerging materials, and intelligent platforms.
abstract: Foodborne pathogens such as Escherichia coli (E. Coli), Salmonella , and Listeria monocytogenes continue to pose a major potential threat to global public health and therefore rapid, accurate, and field-deployable detection methods are still extremely desirable. This review describes cutting-edge examples of advanced biosensing platforms for the strategy of detecting these priority pathogens, focusing on clinical detection and highlighting electrochemical, optical, and microfluidic sensing modalities. This has been enabled by recent advances in functional nanomaterials, molecular recognition elements (including aptamers and nanozymes), and surface engineering strategies rendering sensors much ‘smarter’/improved in terms of sensitivity, specificity, and behaviour towards complex food matrices. However blending these biosensors with artificial intelligence (AI) and Machine Learning (ML) enabled intelligent pattern recognition, real-time analytics, and multiplexing at high-speed, turning traditional detection systems into smart diagnostic devices. We critically review recent case studies in light of biosensor design, signal transduction mechanisms, models of AI, performance validation, and applicability in different food environments. The principal challenges are identified which include matrix interference, instability of biorecognition elements, limitations in scalability, and the need for regulatory standardization. We discuss these with associated mitigation strategies that are technically sound, including ratiometric sensing, microfluidic pre-treatment techniques, explainable AI, and printable electronics. Forward-looking, we discuss biosensors enabled by being self-powered, biosensor hubs with modular pathogen panels, blockchain incorporation, and standardized validation pipelines. This review offers a prospective view toward enabling intelligent, robust, and regulation-ready biosensing platforms for next-generation food safety monitoring through the bridging of technological innovations with practical implementation. title: MESSI: Multimodal Experiments with SyStematic Interrogation using nextflow
abstract: Background: Multimodal biomedical studies increasingly profile multiple molecular and clinical modalities from the same samples, creating new opportunities for disease prediction and biological discovery. However, benchmarking multimodal integration methods remains difficult because studies often use inconsistent preprocessing, unequal tuning strategies, and non-comparable evaluation schemes, limiting fair assessment across methods. Results: We developed MESSI (Multimodal Experiments with SyStematic Interrogation), a reproducible Nextflow-based benchmarking framework for multimodal outcome prediction that standardizes data preparation, supports interoperable R and Python workflows, and enforces leakage-free nested cross-validation for model selection and model assessment. MESSI currently implements representative intermediate- and late-integration methods and supports bulk multiomics, bulk multimodal, and single-cell multiomics datasets. In simulation studies with known ground truth, most methods were well calibrated in the absence of signal and achieved high performance under strong signal, whereas differences emerged under weaker signal and in feature recovery. We then applied MESSI to 19 real datasets spanning cancer, neurodevelopmental, neurodegenerative, infectious, renal, transplant, and metastatic disease settings, with diverse modality combinations including transcriptomic, epigenomic, proteomic, imaging, electrical, clinical, and single-cell-derived features. Across bulk multimodal datasets, classification differences were generally modest, although DIABLO and multiview cooperative learning tended to rank highest, while MOFA+glmnet and MOGONET were weaker overall. Biological enrichment analyses revealed clearer differences: DIABLO, RGCCA, MOFA, and IntegrAO more consistently recovered significant Reactome, oncogenic, and tissue-relevant gene signatures. In single-cell multiomics benchmarks, method rankings were more dataset dependent, but DIABLO performed consistently well across all case studies, while RGCCA also showed strong performance in specific settings. Computational analyses further showed that DIABLO and MOFA had the most favorable runtime and memory profiles, whereas multiview was the most time-intensive and IntegrAO the most memory-demanding. Conclusions: MESSI provides a reproducible, extensible, and equitable framework for benchmarking multimodal integration methods under a common model assessment strategy. Our results indicate that no single method is uniformly optimal across datasets and objectives; instead, method choice should balance predictive performance, biological interpretability, and computational efficiency. MESSI establishes a foundation for transparent benchmarking and future extensions to broader multimodal learning tasks.

title: ARK: Answer-Centric Retriever Tuning via KG-augmented Curriculum Learning
abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has emerged as a powerful framework for knowledge-intensive tasks, yet its effectiveness in long-context scenarios is often bottlenecked by the retriever's inability to distinguish sparse yet crucial evidence. Standard retrievers, optimized for query-document similarity, frequently fail to align with the downstream goal of generating a precise answer. To bridge this gap, we propose a novel fine-tuning framework that optimizes the retriever for Answer Alignment. Specifically, we first identify high-quality positive chunks by evaluating their sufficiency to generate the correct answer. We then employ a curriculum-based contrastive learning scheme to fine-tune the retriever. This curriculum leverages LLM-constructed Knowledge Graphs (KGs) to generate augmented queries, which in turn mine progressively challenging hard negatives. This process trains the retriever to distinguish the answer-sufficient positive chunks from these nuanced distractors, enhancing its generalization. Extensive experiments on 10 datasets from the Ultradomain and LongBench benchmarks demonstrate that our fine-tuned retriever achieves state-of-the-art performance, improving 14.5\% over the base model without substantial architectural modifications and maintaining strong efficiency for long-context RAG. Our work presents a robust and effective methodology for building truly answer-centric retrievers. Source Code is available on https://github.com/valleysprings/ARK/.

title: World2Mind: Cognition Toolkit for Allocentric Spatial Reasoning in Foundation Models
abstract: Achieving robust spatial reasoning remains a fundamental challenge for current Multimodal Foundation Models (MFMs). Existing methods either overfit statistical shortcuts via 3D grounding data or remain confined to 2D visual perception, limiting both spatial reasoning accuracy and generalization in unseen scenarios. Inspired by the spatial cognitive mapping mechanisms of biological intelligence, we propose World2Mind, a training-free spatial intelligence toolkit. At its core, World2Mind leverages 3D reconstruction and instance segmentation models to construct structured spatial cognitive maps, empowering MFMs to proactively acquire targeted spatial knowledge regarding interested landmarks and routes of interest. To provide robust geometric-topological priors, World2Mind synthesizes an Allocentric-Spatial Tree (AST) that uses elliptical parameters to model the top-down layout of landmarks accurately. To mitigate the inherent inaccuracies of 3D reconstruction, we introduce a three-stage reasoning chain comprising tool invocation assessment, modality-decoupled cue collection, and geometry-semantics interwoven reasoning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that World2Mind boosts the performance of frontier models, such as GPT-5.2, by 5%~18%. Astonishingly, relying solely on the AST-structured text, purely text-only foundation models can perform complex 3D spatial reasoning, achieving performance approaching that of advanced multimodal models.
abstract_zh: 稳健的空间推理是当前多模态基础模型（MFMs）面临的核心挑战。现有方法常因过度拟合3D定位数据的统计捷径或局限于2D视觉感知，导致在未知场景中的推理准确性与泛化能力受限。受生物智能空间认知映射机制启发，我们提出了World2Mind，一个无需训练的空间智能工具包。该工具包利用3D重建和实例分割模型构建结构化的空间认知地图，使MFMs能够主动获取感兴趣地标与路径的目标空间知识。为提供稳健的几何拓扑先验，World2Mind合成了异向空间树（AST），利用椭圆参数精确建模地标的自顶向下布局。为缓解3D重建固有的不准确性，我们引入了包含工具调用评估、模态解耦线索收集及几何-语义交织推理的三阶段推理链。实验表明，World2Mind将GPT-5.2等前沿模型的性能提升了5%~18%。值得注意的是，仅依靠AST结构化文本，纯文本模型即可实现复杂的3D空间推理，性能接近先进的多模态模型。

analysis_zh:
## 核心内容
该研究提出了名为 World2Mind 的无需训练（training-free）的空间智能工具包，旨在解决多模态基础模型在 3D 空间推理中的局限性。其核心是通过 3D 重建与实例分割技术构建“异向空间树”（Allocentric-Spatial Tree, AST），将复杂的 3D 环境转化为结构化的几何拓扑先验，并配合三阶段推理链（工具评估、线索收集、交织推理）来增强模型的空间认知能力。

## 为什么相关
本研究与病原生信或临床微生物学属于**弱相关（交叉领域）**。其相关性体现在 AI Agent 层面：在自动化实验室机器人（如处理临床样本、操作复杂仪器）或空间转录组学数据的 3D 建模中，稳健的空间推理是 Agent 理解物理环境、执行精准操作的基础。World2Mind 提供的空间认知框架可为未来开发具备空间感知能力的生物医学智能体提供技术参考。

## 新颖度判断
**较高**。不同于传统的 3D 数据微调（Fine-tuning）或简单的 2D 视觉提示，World2Mind 引入了受生物启发的“异向空间树（AST）”概念，并利用椭圆参数进行自顶向下的布局建模。这种将 3D 物理空间转化为结构化文本/几何描述的方法，使得纯文本模型也能具备极强的 3D 推理能力，具有显著的架构创新。

## 方法与证据
- **方法**：集成 3D 重建与实例分割模型；合成 AST 结构；设计三阶段推理链（Tool invocation, Modality-decoupled cue collection, Geometry-semantics interwoven reasoning）。
- **证据**：在 GPT-5.2 等前沿模型上进行了实验，结果显示性能提升了 5%~18%。此外，实验证明纯文本模型在仅输入 AST 结构化文本时，其 3D 推理表现接近先进的多模态模型（摘要未说明具体对比模型名称）。

## 应用价值
1. **实验室自动化**：提升生物安全实验室机器人在复杂 3D 环境中的导航与样本定位能力。
2. **结构生物学可视化**：辅助模型理解蛋白质复合物或细胞结构的 3D 拓扑关系。
3. **低算力部署**：由于是无需训练的工具包，可快速集成到现有基础模型中，降低了空间推理任务的门槛。

## 局限与风险
- **依赖底层工具**：系统的准确性高度依赖于前端 3D 重建和实例分割模型的质量，尽管提出了缓解策略，但底层误差仍可能传导至推理阶段。
- **实时性未知**：摘要未说明 3D 重建与 AST 合成的计算耗时，可能难以满足高动态环境下的实时推理需求。
- **场景局限**：实验主要针对“地标”和“路径”，在微观生物结构（如细胞内环境）等极高精度要求的场景下是否适用尚不明确。

title: Benchmarking zero-shot single-cell foundation model embeddings for cellular dynamics reconstruction
abstract: Reconstructing cellular trajectories from time-resolved single-cell transcriptomics is fundamental to understanding processes from embryonic development to cancer progression. While single-cell foundation models (scFMs) promise universal biological representations through large-scale pretraining, their capacity to capture the non-linear dynamics governing cell-fate decisions remains uncharacterized. Here we systematically benchmark multiple scFMs across challenging biomedical scenarios involving branching lineages and continuous state transitions. By coupling zero-shot scFM embeddings with dynamic optimal transport, we evaluated their performance against a traditional highly variable gene (HVG) baseline in backtracking progenitor states, interpolating transition intermediates, and extrapolating future fates. We find that zero-shot scFM embeddings underperform the HVG baseline across diverse biological systems, particularly in recovering the distributional complexity of unobserved cells. Mechanistic analysis reveals that current scFM architectures tend to over-compress subtle temporal signals, causing an artificial "linearization" of branched biological structures that may obscure critical divergence points in disease progression. Our findings suggest that while scFMs provide unified cell-state views, the HVG baseline remains more robust for trajectory inference, identifying a fundamental "temporal-compression" bottleneck that must be addressed to develop next-generation, dynamics-aware foundation models.

title: Cross-Species Antimicrobial Resistance Prediction from Genomic Foundation Models
abstract: Cross-species antimicrobial resistance (AMR) prediction is fundamentally an out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization problem: models trained on one set of bacterial taxa must transfer to phylogenetically distinct genomes that may rely on different resistance mechanisms. Across species, resistance arises from a heterogeneous mixture of localized, horizontally transferred gene cassettes and diffuse species-specific genomic backgrounds, making successful transfer inherently mechanism-dependent. Using a strict species holdout protocol, we first establish an interpretable k-mer baseline with Kover and show that strong within-species performance collapses under true cross-species evaluation. This motivates representation-level approaches that preserve transferable biological signals rather than amplify phylogenetic shortcuts. We investigate genomic foundation model embeddings derived from Evo-1-8k-base and introduce diagnostics for layer selection based on activation scale, isotropy, effective rank, and cross-seed stability under native bfloat16 inference. These analyses identify a stability boundary in deeper layers and reveal that embeddings extracted near this boundary provide more robust representations for downstream prediction. To preserve localized resistance signals, we treat per-window embeddings as an ordered multivariate signal and apply MiniRocket to summarize multi-scale local activation patterns instead of relying on global pooling. Our results show that aggregation strategy plays a central role in cross-species AMR prediction and that preserving local activation patterns substantially improves generalization when resistance mechanisms are localized.

title: Discovery of a Hematopoietic Manifold in scGPT Yields a Method for Extracting Performant Algorithms from Biological Foundation Model Internals
abstract: We report the discovery and extraction of a compact hematopoietic algorithm from the single-cell foundation model scGPT, to our knowledge the first biologically useful, competitive algorithm extracted from a foundation model via mechanistic interpretability. We show that scGPT internally encodes a compact hematopoietic manifold with significant developmental branch structure, validated on a strict non-overlap Tabula Sapiens external panel and confirmed via frozen-head zero-shot transfer to an independent multi-donor immune panel. To isolate this geometry, we introduce a general three-stage extraction method consisting of direct operator export from frozen attention weights, a lightweight learned adaptor, and a task-specific readout, producing a standalone algorithm without target-dataset retraining. In 88-split donor-holdout benchmarks against scVI, Palantir, DPT, CellTypist, PCA, and raw-expression baselines, the extracted algorithm achieves the strongest pseudotime-depth ordering and leads on key subtype endpoints (CD4/CD8 AUROC 0.867, mono/macro AUROC 0.951). Compared to standard probing of frozen scGPT embeddings with a 3-layer MLP, the extracted head is BH-significantly better on 6/8 classification endpoints while completing a full 12-split evaluation campaign 34.5x faster with approximately 1000x fewer trainable parameters. The exported operator compresses from three pooled attention heads to a single head without statistically significant loss, and further to a rank-64 surrogate. Mechanistic interpretability of the compact operator reveals a concentrated four-factor core explaining 66.2% of ablation impact, with factors resolving into explicit T/lymphoid, B/plasma, granulocytic, and monocyte/macrophage gene programs. A supplementary second-manifold validation (intercellular communication geometry) confirms that the extraction method generalizes beyond hematopoiesis.
abstract_zh: 本研究从单细胞基础模型 scGPT 中发现并提取了一种紧凑的造血算法，这是已知首个通过机械可解释性（Mechanistic Interpretability）从生物基础模型中提取出的具有实用竞争力的算法。研究证明 scGPT 内部编码了具有显著发育分支结构的造血流形，并在 Tabula Sapiens 外部面板及独立多供体免疫面板上完成了零样本迁移验证。为隔离该几何结构，研究者提出了一种通用的三阶段提取法：从冻结注意力权重中直接导出算子、构建轻量级适配器及任务特定读出，无需目标数据集重训练即可生成独立算法。在与 scVI、Palantir、CellTypist 等基准对比中，该算法在伪时间排序和关键亚型分类（如 CD4/CD8 AUROC 0.867）上表现最优。相比传统的 3 层 MLP 探测，该方法速度提升 34.5 倍，参数量减少约 1000 倍。机械可解释性分析揭示了由四个核心因子组成的基因程序，分别对应 T/淋巴、B/浆细胞、粒细胞和单核/巨噬细胞。补充验证表明该提取方法在细胞间通讯几何学中同样具有通用性。
why_it_matters: 这篇工作更像方法创新，可能直接关联 metagenomics、long-read 或 pathogen identification 流程优化。
analysis_zh:
## 核心内容
该研究利用机械可解释性技术，从预训练的单细胞基础模型 scGPT 的内部注意力机制中，成功识别并提取出了一个专门处理造血系统发育和分类的紧凑算法流形。这标志着研究者不再仅仅将基础模型视为黑盒特征提取器，而是能够从中“剥离”出具有特定生物学功能的独立计算模块。

## 为什么相关
在病原体感染研究或临床微生物学中，宿主免疫反应的单细胞分析是核心任务。该工作提供了一种从大规模预训练模型中快速提取高性能、低功耗分类器的方法，对于处理大规模临床样本、优化病原体诱导的免疫细胞亚型鉴定流程具有直接的技术参考价值。

## 新颖度判断
新颖度高（1.75）。其创新点在于：1. 首次通过机械可解释性路径从生物大模型中提取出功能性算法，而非简单的线性探测（Probing）；2. 提出了“算子导出-适配器-读出”的三阶段通用框架；3. 实现了极高的参数压缩比（1000倍）和推理加速。

## 方法与证据
- **方法**：采用三阶段提取法，核心是从 scGPT 冻结的注意力权重中导出直接算子，并将其压缩为 rank-64 的代理模型。
- **数据与验证**：使用 Tabula Sapiens 外部面板进行严格非重叠验证，并在独立多供体免疫面板上进行零样本迁移。
- **指标**：在 88-split 供体留出法基准测试中，CD4/CD8 分类 AUROC 达 0.867，单核/巨噬细胞 AUROC 达 0.951。相比 3 层 MLP 探测器，在 12-split 评估中速度快 34.5 倍，且在 6/8 个分类终点上具有 BH 显著性优势。

## 应用价值
该方法允许研究者在资源受限的临床环境下，利用基础模型的知识而无需运行庞大的原始模型。提取出的紧凑算子可直接用于精确的细胞分型和伪时间分析，且由于其因子的生物学含义明确（如 T/淋巴、B/浆细胞等基因程序），结果更具可信度。

## 局限与风险
- **模型依赖性**：虽然方法号称通用，但核心证据主要基于 scGPT 架构，在其他架构（如 Geneformer）上的表现摘要未说明。
- **生物学范围**：主要聚焦于造血系统和细胞间通讯，对于更复杂的病理状态或非免疫组织的适用性仍需进一步验证。
- **算子压缩**：虽然 rank-64 代理模型表现良好，但在极度复杂的生物流形中是否存在信息丢失风险尚不明确。

title: Conversational Artificial Intelligence-Enabled Molecular Characterization of Sezary Syndrome Reveals Distinct Pathway-Level Alterations Compared with Non-Sezary Cutaneous T-Cell Lymphoma
abstract: BackgroundSezary syndrome (SS) represents an aggressive leukemic variant of cutaneous T-cell lymphoma (CTCL) with distinct clinical behavior compared with other CTCL subtypes. While prior studies have identified recurrent genomic alterations in CTCL, a systematic pathway-centric comparison between SS and non-SS CTCL remains limited. We applied our conversational artificial intelligence (AI) platform for precision oncology, to accelerate hypothesis generation and integrative interpretation of public genomic data. MethodsWe performed a secondary analysis of somatic mutation and clinical data from the Columbia University CTCL cohort available via cBioPortal. Samples were stratified into SS (n=26) and non-SS CTCL (n=17). High-impact coding variants were retained and annotated to curated functional gene groups and signaling pathways relevant to CTCL biology. Pathway-level mutation frequencies were compared using Fishers exact test, with effect sizes summarized by odds ratios. Tumor mutation burden (TMB) was compared using Wilcoxon rank-sum testing. Subtype-specific gene-gene co-mutation patterns were assessed using pairwise association testing and visualized with heatmaps and oncoplots, with our conversational AI agents facilitating interactive exploration and prioritization of results. ResultsOverall TMB did not differ between SS and non-SS CTCL (p=0.83), indicating comparable global mutational burden. Pathway-level analyses revealed enrichment of alterations affecting epigenetic regulators, tumor suppressor and cell-cycle control genes, NFAT signaling, and apoptosis/immune regulation in SS, whereas MAPK and JAK-STAT pathway alterations were relatively more frequent in non-SS CTCL. Co-mutation analysis demonstrated fewer but more focused gene-gene interactions in SS compared with broader co-mutation networks in non-SS CTCL, suggesting divergent evolutionary constraints. Several genes (including ERBB2, WWC1, POSTN) showed borderline subtype-specific enrichment, warranting further validation. ConclusionsConversational AI-enhanced analysis reveals that SS is distinguished from other CTCL subtypes not by higher mutational load, but by qualitative differences in pathway involvement, particularly epigenetic dysregulation, immune escape, and transcriptional control. These findings generate testable hypotheses for downstream validation in patient-level datasets and demonstrate the utility of conversational AI agents as accelerators of translational cancer genomics.
abstract_zh: 塞扎里综合征（SS）是皮肤T细胞淋巴瘤（CTCL）的一种侵袭性白血病变体。本研究利用对话式人工智能（AI）精准肿瘤学平台，对哥伦比亚大学CTCL队列（SS组n=26，非SS组n=17）的体细胞突变和临床数据进行了二次分析。研究重点分析了高影响编码变异，并将其注释至关键信号通路。结果显示，SS与非SS CTCL的肿瘤突变负荷（TMB）无显著差异（p=0.83）。通路层面分析揭示，SS在表观遗传调节因子、抑癌基因、细胞周期控制、NFAT信号传导及凋亡/免疫调节通路中存在显著富集；而非SS CTCL则在MAPK和JAK-STAT通路中突变更频繁。共突变分析表明，SS的基因互作网络比非SS更聚焦。研究结论认为，SS的分子特征在于特定的通路改变而非突变负荷总量，同时证明了对话式AI在加速转化癌症基因组学解释中的实用价值。
why_it_matters: 这篇工作更接近临床/监测落地，适合评估其对快速识别、预警或治疗辅助的实际价值。
analysis_zh:
## 核心内容
该研究利用对话式AI平台对哥伦比亚大学CTCL队列（n=43）的基因组数据进行二次挖掘，对比了塞扎里综合征（SS）与非SS皮肤T细胞淋巴瘤的分子差异。核心发现是两者在总肿瘤突变负荷（TMB）上没有统计学差异（p=0.83），但在受累通路上有显著定性区别：SS侧重于表观遗传和免疫逃逸通路，而非SS侧重于MAPK和JAK-STAT通路。

## 为什么相关
本研究直接切入“基因组学+AI/LLM/Agent”的交叉点。它展示了如何利用对话式AI代理（Conversational AI agents）来辅助临床研究人员进行复杂的基因组数据解释、假设生成和结果优先级排序，属于AI赋能精准医疗的典型案例。

## 新颖度判断
中等偏高。虽然SS的基因组研究已有先例，但引入“对话式AI平台”作为交互式探索工具是其主要创新点。这种方法改变了传统的静态生物信息学分析流程，强调了AI在转化医学中作为“研究加速器”的角色。

## 方法与证据
研究采用了cBioPortal中的体细胞突变数据，样本量为26例SS和17例非SS。统计学方法包括费舍尔精确检验（Fisher's exact test）比较通路频率，以及威尔科克森秩和检验比较TMB。AI代理参与了结果的交互式探索。具体证据显示，ERBB2、WWC1和POSTN等基因表现出亚型特异性富集趋势，且SS的共突变网络比非SS更集中，暗示了不同的进化约束。

## 应用价值
临床上，这些发现有助于开发区分SS与非SS CTCL的分子诊断标志物。对于AI领域，该工作验证了对话式AI在处理复杂生物医学数据、辅助科研人员快速提取关键生物学见解方面的可行性，为开发临床肿瘤学决策支持系统提供了参考。

## 局限与风险
样本量相对较小（总计43例），部分基因（如ERBB2）的亚型特异性富集仅处于临界水平，尚需更大规模的独立队列验证。此外，摘要未详细说明对话式AI的具体模型架构（如是否基于GPT-4等）及其在分析中可能产生的幻觉风险控制机制。

title: Fingerprinting Fluorescent In Situ Hybridization Enables Multiplexed Identification of Pathogenic Bacteria.
abstract: Fluorescence in situ hybridization (FISH) is a highly specific technique for pathogenic bacteria detection that requires no culturing and provides simultaneous information on pathogenic bacteria abundance, morphology, and spatial localization. However, the limited sensitivity and poor multiplexing capacity of conventional FISH have hindered its broader application. Herein, we proposed a fingerprinting FISH (FinFISH) strategy driven by DNA self-assembly for multiplexed pathogenic bacteria detection. Using respiratory pathogens as representative models, FinFISH employs three distinct fluorophores in combinatorial labeling to generate identifiable fluorescent fingerprints for each species. In this work, FAM, Cy3, and Cy5 were selected as the fluorescent reporters because they represent well-established fluorophore combinations for multicolor imaging and combinatorial encoding, with minimal spectral overlap under standard fluorescence microscopy conditions. This strategy enables pathogen detection far beyond the limitations imposed by fluorescence channel numbers, effectively overcoming the throughput bottleneck of conventional imaging systems while offering high scalability for further expansion. Additionally, a custom-designed enclosed chip featuring multichannel reaction chambers improves parallel sample processing and simplifies experimental operation. Experimental results demonstrated that FinFISH not only performed well in identifying pathogenic bacteria within simulated sputum and urine samples but also proved applicable to clinical samples. Moreover, FinFISH provides additional semiquantitative insights into mixed infections. With future integration of expanded probe design and artificial intelligence (AI)-assisted analysis, FinFISH has the potential to advance clinical pathogenic bacteria diagnostics, microbial colocalization studies, and spatial analysis of intratumoral bacteria.
abstract_zh: 荧光原位杂交（FISH）是一种无需培养即可检测病原菌的高特异性技术，能同时提供病原菌丰度、形态和空间定位信息。然而，传统 FISH 灵敏度低且多重检测能力有限，限制了其广泛应用。本研究提出了一种由 DNA 自组装驱动的指纹荧光原位杂交（FinFISH）策略，用于多重病原菌检测。以呼吸道病原体为模型，FinFISH 利用 FAM、Cy3 和 Cy5 三种荧光团进行组合标记，为每种病原体生成独特的荧光指纹。该策略突破了荧光通道数量对检测通量的限制，克服了传统成像系统的瓶颈，具有良好的扩展性。此外，研究设计了具有多通道反应室的封闭式芯片，简化了操作并提高了并行处理能力。实验结果显示，FinFISH 在模拟痰液、尿液及临床样本中均表现出良好的识别性能，并能对混合感染进行半定量分析。未来结合 AI 辅助分析，该技术有望推动临床病原菌诊断和空间微生物组学研究。
why_it_matters: 这篇工作更接近临床/监测落地，适合评估其对快速识别、预警或治疗辅助的实际价值。
analysis_zh:
## 核心内容
该研究开发了一种名为 FinFISH（指纹荧光原位杂交）的新型检测策略。其核心是通过 DNA 自组装技术，利用 FAM、Cy3 和 Cy5 三种标准荧光团的组合标记（Combinatorial Labeling），为不同的病原菌生成特异性的“荧光指纹”。这种方法旨在解决传统 FISH 技术在多重检测（Multiplexing）时受限于显微镜物理通道数量的问题，并配套开发了多通道封闭式芯片以优化实验流程。

## 为什么相关
在临床微生物学领域，快速且多重的病原体识别是诊断混合感染的关键。FinFISH 能够直接在痰液和尿液等临床样本中工作，且无需培养，这符合临床对快速诊断的需求。对于病原生物信息学领域，该技术提供的空间定位和半定量数据为研究微生物群落结构和种间相互作用提供了高质量的底层数据。

## 新颖度判断
新颖度中等偏上。其创新点不在于发现新的生物标志物，而在于编码策略的改进：通过 DNA 自组装驱动的组合编码，使有限的荧光通道能够识别超出通道数量的病原体种类。相比于传统的 1:1 探针标记，这种“指纹”概念显著提升了成像检测的通量上限。

## 方法与证据
研究采用呼吸道病原体作为模型生物。实验证据包括：1. 使用 FAM、Cy3、Cy5 三种荧光团在标准荧光显微镜下实现了多重编码；2. 在模拟样本（痰液、尿液）中验证了识别准确性；3. 进行了临床样本实测；4. 证明了该系统对混合感染具有半定量分析能力。此外，研究还展示了定制化封闭芯片在简化操作和并行处理方面的有效性。

## 应用价值
该技术在临床病原菌快速诊断、微生物空间共定位研究以及肿瘤内细菌的空间分析（Spatial Analysis）中具有直接应用价值。其高扩展性意味着通过增加探针组合，可以进一步扩大检测谱，适用于复杂感染环境的现场筛查。

## 局限与风险
1. **AI 交叉程度弱**：摘要中明确指出 AI 辅助分析属于“未来集成（Future integration）”方向，目前阶段尚未展示具体的 AI 算法模型或自动化识别逻辑。2. **灵敏度数据模糊**：虽然提到传统 FISH 灵敏度低，但摘要未给出 FinFISH 具体的检测限（LOD）指标。3. **探针设计复杂性**：随着检测目标增加，DNA 自组装探针的组合设计与杂交动力学控制可能变得复杂，摘要未说明在大规模多重检测下的串扰处理细节。

title: Statistical and structural identifiability in representation learning
abstract: Representation learning models exhibit a surprising stability in their internal representations. Whereas most prior work treats this stability as a single property, we formalize it as two distinct concepts: statistical identifiability (consistency of representations across runs) and structural identifiability (alignment of representations with some unobserved ground truth). Recognizing that perfect pointwise identifiability is generally unrealistic for modern representation learning models, we propose new model-agnostic definitions of statistical and structural near-identifiability of representations up to some error tolerance $ε$. Leveraging these definitions, we prove a statistical $ε$-near-identifiability result for the representations of models with nonlinear decoders, generalizing existing identifiability theory beyond last-layer representations in e.g. generative pre-trained transformers (GPTs) to near-identifiability of the intermediate representations of a broad class of models including (masked) autoencoders (MAEs) and supervised learners. Although these weaker assumptions confer weaker identifiability, we show that independent components analysis (ICA) can resolve much of the remaining linear ambiguity for this class of models, and validate and measure our near-identifiability claims empirically. With additional assumptions on the data-generating process, statistical identifiability extends to structural identifiability, yielding a simple and practical recipe for disentanglement: ICA post-processing of latent representations. On synthetic benchmarks, this approach achieves state-of-the-art disentanglement using a vanilla autoencoder. With a foundation model-scale MAE for cell microscopy, it disentangles biological variation from technical batch effects, substantially improving downstream generalization.
why_it_matters: 这篇工作偏基础模型/Agent方向，可能影响病原检测任务的建模上限，值得关注其任务定义与评测设计。

title: Exhaustive Circuit Mapping of a Single-Cell Foundation Model Reveals Massive Redundancy, Heavy-Tailed Hub Architecture, and Layer-Dependent Differentiation Control
abstract: Mechanistic interpretability of biological foundation models has relied on selective feature sampling, pairwise interaction testing, and observational trajectory analysis. Each of these can introduce systematic bias. Here we present three experiments that address these limitations through exhaustive circuit tracing, higher order combinatorial ablation, and causal trajectory steering in Geneformer, a transformer based single cell foundation model. First, exhaustive tracing of all 4065 active sparse autoencoder features at layer 5 yields 1393850 significant downstream edges, a 27 fold expansion over selective sampling. This reveals a heavy tailed hub distribution in which 1.8 percent of features account for disproportionate connectivity and 40 percent of the top 20 hubs lack biological annotation. These results indicate systematic annotation bias in prior selective analyses. Second, three way combinatorial ablation across 8 feature triplets shows that redundancy deepens monotonically with interaction order, with a three way ratio of 0.59 versus a pairwise ratio of 0.74, and with zero synergy. This confirms that the model architecture is subadditive at all tested orders. Third, trajectory guided feature steering establishes a causal link between layer position and differentiation directionality. Late layer features at L17 consistently push cell states toward maturity, with fraction positive equal to 1.0. Early and mid layer features at L0 and L11 mostly push away from maturity, with fraction positive ranging from 0.00 to 0.58. Together these results move from correlation toward causal evidence for layer dependent control of cell state.
abstract_zh: 本研究针对生物基础模型机械可解释性中存在的选择性特征采样偏差，对基于 Transformer 的单细胞基础模型 Geneformer 进行了详尽的电路映射。研究通过三个实验展开：首先，对第 5 层的 4065 个稀疏自编码器（SAE）特征进行详尽追踪，识别出 1,393,850 条显著下游边，较传统选择性采样扩大了 27 倍，揭示了长尾枢纽架构，其中 1.8% 的特征贡献了极高连接性，且 40% 的顶级枢纽缺乏生物学注释。其次，通过对 8 组特征三元组进行三向组合消融，发现模型冗余随交互阶数单调增加（三向比率 0.59 对比双向 0.74），且无协同效应，证实架构呈次加性。最后，轨迹引导的特征转向实验确立了层位置与分化方向的因果联系：第 17 层特征一致地将细胞状态推向成熟（正向比例 1.0），而早期（L0）和中期（L11）特征则主要推离成熟状态。该研究为层依赖的细胞状态控制提供了从相关性转向因果关系的证据。
why_it_matters: 这篇工作偏基础模型/Agent方向，可能影响病原检测任务的建模上限，值得关注其任务定义与评测设计。
analysis_zh:
## 核心内容
该研究利用机械可解释性（Mechanistic Interpretability）方法，对单细胞基础模型 Geneformer 进行了深度解构。核心发现包括：模型内部存在极高的特征冗余；其连接架构呈重尾分布（少数枢纽特征主导）；以及模型层级与生物学分化方向之间存在明确的因果映射关系，即深层网络负责驱动细胞向成熟态转化。

## 为什么相关
虽然研究对象是单细胞模型 Geneformer，但其揭示的“生物基础模型如何编码生物学逻辑”的方法论，对于病原体基因组建模、蛋白质功能预测等领域具有高度参考价值。特别是针对 40% 缺乏注释的枢纽特征的发现，暗示了 AI 模型可能捕捉到了现有生物学知识库尚未覆盖的病原-宿主交互或基因调控关键节点。

## 新颖度判断
**高（7.72）**。该工作跳出了传统的“观察性轨迹分析”，首次在生物基础模型上实现了“详尽电路追踪（Exhaustive Circuit Tracing）”和“高阶组合消融”。其通过稀疏自编码器（SAE）将黑盒模型拆解为可解释特征，并量化了三向交互下的冗余度，这在生物 AI 领域属于前沿探索。

## 方法与证据
1. **详尽追踪**：在 Geneformer 第 5 层分析了 4065 个 SAE 特征，发现 1,393,850 条边，证明了以往选择性采样会遗漏大量关键连接。
2. **组合消融**：对比了 8 组特征三元组，三向消融比率为 0.59，低于双向的 0.74，且协同效应为零，证明了模型内部逻辑的次加性（Subadditive）。
3. **因果转向**：对比 L0、L11 与 L17 层，发现 L17 的特征转向实验中，细胞向成熟态推进的比例达到 1.0，而早期层仅为 0.00-0.58，提供了层级功能的直接证据。

## 应用价值
1. **模型优化**：揭示的大规模冗余（Massive Redundancy）为生物基础模型的压缩和蒸馏提供了理论依据。
2. **新靶点发现**：那 40% 缺乏注释的高连接枢纽特征可能是潜在的生物学新机制，可用于指导临床微生物学中的新药靶点筛选。
3. **细胞工程**：确立了通过特定层特征操纵细胞状态的因果路径，有助于精准控制细胞分化或病理状态逆转。

## 局限与风险
1. **模型局限**：实验仅基于 Geneformer 这一特定架构，其结论（如无协同效应）是否普适于其他蛋白质组学或基因组学模型尚待验证。
2. **计算成本**：详尽电路映射涉及 139 万条边的计算，对于更大规模的模型或更深层次的追踪，计算开销可能难以承受。
3. **生物学验证**：摘要未说明那 40% 无注释的枢纽特征是否在湿实验中得到了功能验证，存在“模型幻觉”或“过拟合统计噪声”的风险。

title: MDER-DR: Multi-Hop Question Answering with Entity-Centric Summaries
abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) over Knowledge Graphs (KGs) suffers from the fact that indexing approaches may lose important contextual nuance when text is reduced to triples, thereby degrading performance in downstream Question-Answering (QA) tasks, particularly for multi-hop QA, which requires composing answers from multiple entities, facts, or relations. We propose a domain-agnostic, KG-based QA framework that covers both the indexing and retrieval/inference phases. A new indexing approach called Map-Disambiguate-Enrich-Reduce (MDER) generates context-derived triple descriptions and subsequently integrates them with entity-level summaries, thus avoiding the need for explicit traversal of edges in the graph during the QA retrieval phase. Complementing this, we introduce Decompose-Resolve (DR), a retrieval mechanism that decomposes user queries into resolvable triples and grounds them in the KG via iterative reasoning. Together, MDER and DR form an LLM-driven QA pipeline that is robust to sparse, incomplete, and complex relational data. Experiments show that on standard and domain specific benchmarks, MDER-DR achieves substantial improvements over standard RAG baselines (up to 66%), while maintaining cross-lingual robustness. Our code is available at https://github.com/DataSciencePolimi/MDER-DR_RAG.
abstract_zh: 针对知识图谱（KG）的检索增强生成（RAG）在将文本简化为三元组时，往往会丢失重要的上下文细微差别，导致多跳问答（QA）性能下降。为此，我们提出了一种领域无关的 KG 问答框架 MDER-DR，涵盖索引与检索推理阶段。在索引阶段，MDER（映射-消歧-丰富-归约）方法生成源自上下文的三元组描述，并将其与实体级摘要整合，从而在检索阶段无需显式遍历图边缘。在检索阶段，DR（分解-解决）机制将用户查询分解为可解析的三元组，并通过迭代推理将其定位到 KG 中。MDER-DR 构成了一个由大语言模型（LLM）驱动的问答流水线，对稀疏、不完整和复杂的关联数据具有鲁棒性。实验表明，在标准和特定领域基准测试中，MDER-DR 较标准 RAG 基线提升高达 66%，并表现出跨语言鲁棒性。
why_it_matters: 这篇工作更像方法创新，可能直接关联 metagenomics、long-read 或 pathogen identification 流程优化。
analysis_zh:
## 核心内容
该研究提出了 MDER-DR 框架，旨在解决知识图谱 RAG 中因三元组简化导致的上下文缺失问题。核心组件包括：1) MDER 索引法，通过生成包含上下文的三元组描述和实体摘要来保留信息；2) DR 检索机制，通过查询分解和迭代推理实现多跳问答。该框架由 LLM 驱动，强调在不遍历图边缘的情况下完成复杂推理。

## 为什么相关
在病原生物学和临床微生物学中，知识通常以复杂的生物网络（如宿主-病原体相互作用、耐药基因调控网络）形式存在。这类数据具有高度的“多跳”属性（例如：查询“某种耐药基因通过哪些代谢途径影响特定抗生素的敏感性”）。MDER-DR 处理稀疏、不完整数据的能力，直接契合临床微生物领域中知识库更新不及时或实验数据碎片化的现状。

## 新颖度判断
新颖度较高（6.0）。其创新点在于打破了传统 GraphRAG 依赖显式图遍历（Edge Traversal）的局限，转而采用“实体中心化摘要”与“上下文增强三元组”相结合的索引策略。这种方法在保留图结构关联性的同时，利用 LLM 的语义理解能力弥补了结构化数据的硬性缺失。

## 方法与证据
- **方法**：采用 MDER（Map-Disambiguate-Enrich-Reduce）流程进行数据预处理，并利用 DR（Decompose-Resolve）进行迭代式查询解析。
- **数据与实验**：在标准基准和特定领域基准（摘要未具体说明领域名称）上进行了测试。
- **指标**：相比标准 RAG 基线，性能提升最高达 66%，并验证了跨语言鲁棒性。

## 应用价值
该方法可用于构建更智能的临床微生物决策支持系统。例如，在基因组学研究中，可利用该框架整合异构的文献数据和基因组注释，辅助研究人员在海量稀疏数据中发现病原体致病机制的潜在关联。其跨语言特性有助于整合全球不同语言的病原体监测报告。

## 局限与风险
- **计算开销**：摘要提到该流程由 LLM 驱动且涉及迭代推理，这可能导致在处理大规模生物医学知识图谱时推理延迟较高或 API 调用成本昂贵。
- **领域适配性**：虽然声称“领域无关”，但生物医学术语具有高度专业性，MDER 阶段的“消歧”和“丰富”在处理同名异义的基因或菌株时，其准确性仍需在真实临床数据中验证。
- **数据依赖**：摘要未说明对超大规模图谱（亿级节点）的扩展性表现。

title: RAGPerf: An End-to-End Benchmarking Framework for Retrieval-Augmented Generation Systems
abstract: We present the design and implementation of a RAG-based AI system benchmarking (RAGPerf) framework for characterizing the system behaviors of RAG pipelines. To facilitate detailed profiling and fine-grained performance analysis, RAGPerf decouples the RAG workflow into several modular components - embedding, indexing, retrieval, reranking, and generation. RAGPerf offers the flexibility for users to configure the core parameters of each component and examine their impact on the end-to-end query performance and quality. RAGPerf has a workload generator to model real-world scenarios by supporting diverse datasets (e.g., text, pdf, code, and audio), different retrieval and update ratios, and query distributions. RAGPerf also supports different embedding models, major vector databases such as LanceDB, Milvus, Qdrant, Chroma, and Elasticsearch, as well as different LLMs for content generation. It automates the collection of performance metrics (i.e., end-to-end query throughput, host/GPU memory footprint, and CPU/GPU utilization) and accuracy metrics (i.e., context recall, query accuracy, and factual consistency). We demonstrate the capabilities of RAGPerf through a comprehensive set of experiments and open source its codebase at GitHub. Our evaluation shows that RAGPerf incurs negligible performance overhead.
abstract_zh: 本文设计并实现了 RAGPerf，这是一个用于表征检索增强生成（RAG）流水线系统行为的端到端基准测试框架。为了实现详细的剖析和细粒度的性能分析，RAGPerf 将 RAG 工作流解耦为嵌入、索引、检索、重排序和生成五个模块化组件。该框架允许用户配置各组件的核心参数，并评估其对端到端查询性能和质量的影响。RAGPerf 内置工作负载生成器，通过支持文本、PDF、代码和音频等多样化数据集、不同的检索与更新比例以及查询分布来模拟真实场景。它支持多种嵌入模型、主流向量数据库（如 LanceDB、Milvus、Qdrant、Chroma 和 Elasticsearch）以及不同的生成大语言模型（LLM）。RAGPerf 可自动收集性能指标（如端到端查询吞吐量、主机/GPU 内存占用、CPU/GPU 利用率）和准确性指标（如上下文召回率、查询准确性和事实一致性）。实验评估表明，RAGPerf 的运行开销极低，目前已开源其代码库。
why_it_matters: 这篇工作更像方法创新，可能直接关联 metagenomics、long-read 或 pathogen identification 流程优化。
analysis_zh:
## 核心内容
该研究推出了 RAGPerf，一个专门针对检索增强生成（RAG）系统的端到端基准测试框架。其核心在于将复杂的 RAG 流程拆解为嵌入（embedding）、索引（indexing）、检索（retrieval）、重排序（reranking）和生成（generation）五个独立模块，旨在通过细粒度的性能剖析，量化不同配置对系统吞吐量、资源利用率及生成质量的影响。

## 为什么相关
在病原体生物信息学和临床微生物学领域，研究人员常需从海量文献、基因组数据库或临床指南中检索信息。RAG 是构建临床决策支持系统或病原体鉴定 Agent 的核心技术。RAGPerf 提供的性能与准确性评估工具，能直接帮助优化这些领域中处理长文本（如宏基因组分析报告）或复杂查询时的响应速度与事实一致性，确保临床建议的可靠性。

## 新颖度判断
该工作具有较高的工程创新性。相比于仅关注准确性的基准测试，RAGPerf 实现了系统级性能（如 GPU 内存占用、CPU 利用率）与算法准确性（如事实一致性、上下文召回率）的同步自动化测量。其对多种向量数据库（LanceDB, Milvus 等）和多模态数据（PDF、音频）的支持，使其在 RAG 评估工具中具有较强的综合性。

## 方法与证据
RAGPerf 采用模块化解耦方法。实验通过工作负载生成器模拟了真实世界的查询分布和数据更新场景。支持的后端包括 LanceDB、Milvus、Qdrant、Chroma 和 Elasticsearch。评估指标涵盖了硬件层面的吞吐量、内存足迹，以及模型层面的上下文召回率（context recall）和事实一致性（factual consistency）。摘要提到，实验证明该框架本身的性能开销“微不足道”（negligible）。

## 应用价值
对于开发病原体鉴定 AI 的团队，RAGPerf 可用于：1. 在不同向量数据库间进行选型测试，寻找最适合基因序列索引的方案；2. 优化 RAG 流程中的重排序步骤，以提高临床诊断建议的准确率；3. 监控系统在处理大规模病原体数据库时的 GPU 资源消耗，优化部署成本。

## 局限与风险
摘要未说明该框架是否针对生物医学领域的特殊术语或长序列数据（如 DNA 序列）进行了专门的优化或分词适配。此外，虽然支持多模态，但对于临床微生物学中常见的图像（如显微镜照片）或复杂表格数据的处理能力在摘要中未明确提及。该工具属于通用 AI 基础设施，与病原体领域的交叉属于“中等相关”，主要作为底层优化工具使用。

title: Structured Linked Data as a Memory Layer for Agent-Orchestrated Retrieval
abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems typically treat documents as flat text, ignoring the structured metadata and linked relationships that knowledge graphs provide. In this paper, we investigate whether structured linked data, specifically Schema.org markup and dereferenceable entity pages served by a Linked Data Platform, can improve retrieval accuracy and answer quality in both standard and agentic RAG systems. We conduct a controlled experiment across four domains (editorial, legal, travel, e-commerce) using Vertex AI Vector Search 2.0 for retrieval and the Google Agent Development Kit (ADK) for agentic reasoning. Our experimental design tests seven conditions: three document representations (plain HTML, HTML with JSON-LD, and an enhanced agentic-optimized entity page) crossed with two retrieval modes (standard RAG and agentic RAG with multi-hop link traversal), plus an Enhanced+ condition that adds rich navigational affordances and entity interlinking. Our results reveal that while JSON-LD markup alone provides only modest improvements, our enhanced entity page format, incorporating llms.txt-style agent instructions, breadcrumbs, and neural search capabilities, achieves substantial gains: +29.6% accuracy improvement for standard RAG and +29.8% for the full agentic pipeline. The Enhanced+ variant, with richer navigational affordances, achieves the highest absolute scores (accuracy: 4.85/5, completeness: 4.55/5), though the incremental gain over the base enhanced format is not statistically significant. We release our dataset, evaluation framework, and enhanced entity page templates to support reproducibility.
abstract_zh: 检索增强生成（RAG）系统通常将文档视为扁平文本，忽略了知识图谱提供的结构化元数据和链接关系。本研究探讨了结构化链接数据（特别是 Schema.org 标记和由链接数据平台提供的可解引用实体页面）能否提升标准及智能体 RAG 系统的检索准确性和回答质量。研究在编辑、法律、旅游和电子商务四个领域开展了对照实验，采用 Vertex AI Vector Search 2.0 进行检索，并利用 Google Agent Development Kit (ADK) 进行智能体推理。实验测试了七种条件，涵盖三种文档表示（纯 HTML、带 JSON-LD 的 HTML、增强型智能体优化实体页面）与两种检索模式（标准 RAG 和带多跳链接遍历的智能体 RAG）的交叉组合。结果表明，仅靠 JSON-LD 标记改进有限，但集成 llms.txt 风格指令、面包屑导航和神经搜索能力的增强型实体页面格式，使标准 RAG 准确率提升 29.6%，完整智能体流水线提升 29.8%。Enhanced+ 变体在准确度（4.85/5）和完整性（4.55/5）上达到最高分，尽管其相对于基础增强格式的增量提升在统计上并不显著。
why_it_matters: 这篇工作更像方法创新，可能直接关联 metagenomics、long-read 或 pathogen identification 流程优化。
analysis_zh:
## 核心内容
该研究提出了一种将结构化链接数据（Linked Data）作为智能体（Agent）记忆层的方法，旨在解决传统 RAG 系统将文档视为“扁平文本”而丢失语义关联的问题。通过在实体页面中嵌入 Schema.org 标记、llms.txt 风格的智能体指令以及多跳（multi-hop）链接遍历机制，显著提升了 LLM 智能体在复杂任务中的检索精度和回答质量。

## 为什么相关
虽然该论文的实验领域为法律和电商，但其核心方法论与**病原体基因组学及临床微生物学**高度相关。在宏基因组分析中，物种、基因功能、代谢通路和临床表型之间存在复杂的图谱关系。传统的扁平化 RAG 难以处理“寻找携带特定耐药基因且在特定宿主中发现的病原体”这类多跳查询。本文提出的“链接数据作为记忆层”的架构，可直接应用于构建基于 BioSchemas 或临床本体（Ontology）的病原体知识库，优化自动化诊断智能体的推理流程。

## 新颖度判断
**新颖度：中等偏上**。该研究的新颖之处在于不仅使用了 JSON-LD 等结构化数据，还专门为智能体设计了“增强型实体页面”，并引入了 `llms.txt` 风格的显式指令来引导智能体进行链接遍历。这种将 Web 链接架构与 Agent 推理路径深度结合的思路，比单纯的向量检索更具结构化思维。

## 方法与证据
研究采用了受控实验设计，工具链包括 **Vertex AI Vector Search 2.0** 和 **Google Agent Development Kit (ADK)**。实验对比了 7 种条件，数据覆盖 4 个领域。关键证据显示：
- **性能提升**：增强型格式在标准 RAG 和智能体流水线中分别带来了 **+29.6%** 和 **+29.8%** 的准确率提升。
- **最高指标**：Enhanced+ 变体在 5 分制评分中，准确度达到 **4.85**，完整性达到 **4.55**。
- **对比结论**：单纯添加 JSON-LD 效果有限，必须结合导航支持（如面包屑、互联链接）才能发挥智能体的多跳推理能力。

## 应用价值
在生物医学领域，该方法可用于优化**耐药性分析智能体**。通过将 NCBI、UniProt 等数据库的条目转化为“智能体优化型实体页面”，研究人员可以利用 Agent 自动在不同数据库间进行“多跳链接遍历”，从而实现从序列特征到临床意义的自动化关联分析。此外，提供的增强实体页面模板可直接用于构建实验室内部的结构化知识库。

## 局限与风险
1. **领域局限性**：实验对象为旅游、电商等通用领域，未在生物信息学或临床医学等高度专业化、术语密集的领域验证。
2. **统计显著性**：Enhanced+ 变体虽然得分最高，但相对于基础增强格式的提升在统计上并不显著，说明增加过多的导航信息可能存在边际效用递减。
3. **计算开销**：摘要未说明多跳链接遍历带来的额外 Token 消耗和推理延迟，这在处理大规模基因组元数据时可能是个挑战。

title: Overview of the TREC 2025 Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) Track
abstract: The second edition of the TREC Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) Track advances research on systems that integrate retrieval and generation to address complex, real-world information needs. Building on the foundation of the inaugural 2024 track, this year's challenge introduces long, multi-sentence narrative queries to better reflect the deep search task with the growing demand for reasoning-driven responses. Participants are tasked with designing pipelines that combine retrieval and generation while ensuring transparency and factual grounding. The track leverages the MS MARCO V2.1 corpus and employs a multi-layered evaluation framework encompassing relevance assessment, response completeness, attribution verification, and agreement analysis. By emphasizing multi-faceted narratives and attribution-rich answers from over 150 submissions this year, the TREC 2025 RAG Track aims to foster innovation in creating trustworthy, context-aware systems for retrieval augmented generation.
abstract_zh: 第二届 TREC 检索增强生成（RAG）赛道旨在推进整合检索与生成系统的研究，以解决复杂的现实信息需求。在 2024 年首届赛道的基础上，本届挑战赛引入了长篇、多句的叙述性查询，以反映深度搜索任务中日益增长的推理驱动响应需求。参赛者需设计结合检索与生成的流水线，并确保透明度和事实依据。该赛道利用 MS MARCO V2.1 语料库，采用包含相关性评估、回答完整性、归因验证和一致性分析的多层评估框架。通过强调多维叙述和归因丰富的答案（本年度收到超过 150 份提交），TREC 2025 RAG 赛道旨在促进创建可信、上下文感知的检索增强生成系统。
why_it_matters: 这篇工作偏数据集或基准构建，适合判断是否能作为病原组学训练或评测资源。
analysis_zh:
## 核心内容
该论文概述了 TREC 2025 检索增强生成（RAG）赛道的任务设计与评估标准。核心任务是处理长篇、多句的叙述性查询（narrative queries），要求系统在 MS MARCO V2.1 语料库基础上，通过检索与生成的结合，提供具有事实依据（factual grounding）和透明归因的推理响应。

## 为什么相关
本研究属于**弱 AI 交叉**。虽然其核心是通用的信息检索与自然语言处理，但其提出的“长篇叙述性查询”和“归因验证”框架，对于病原组学或临床微生物学中复杂的临床咨询（如：根据多项检测结果推断病原体并给出治疗建议）具有高度的方法论参考价值。它为构建可信的医学知识库问答系统提供了评测基准。

## 新颖度判断
新颖度中等（0.5）。该工作是 2024 年赛道的延续，其主要创新点在于从短查询转向“长篇多句叙述性查询”，并强化了对“归因（attribution）”和“推理驱动响应”的要求，这反映了 RAG 技术从简单问答向复杂逻辑推理演进的趋势。

## 方法与证据
- **数据规模**：使用了 MS MARCO V2.1 语料库，收到了超过 150 份系统提交。
- **任务设计**：引入长篇叙述性查询，要求系统输出具备透明度和事实依据的流水线结果。
- **评估框架**：采用多层评估，包括相关性（relevance）、回答完整性（completeness）、归因验证（attribution verification）以及一致性分析（agreement analysis）。

## 应用价值
对于病原生信和临床微生物学领域，该赛道的成果可用于指导开发临床决策支持 Agent。特别是其“归因验证”方法，可用于确保 AI 生成的耐药性分析或致病机制解释能够准确溯源至权威文献或基因组数据库，降低大模型的幻觉风险。

## 局限与风险
- **领域局限性**：该赛道使用的是 MS MARCO V2.1 通用语料库，摘要未说明其在生物医学或基因组学等专业领域的迁移表现。
- **模型细节缺失**：摘要未披露 150 份提交中具体表现优秀的模型架构或算法细节。
- **评估复杂性**：多层评估框架虽然全面，但在实际临床应用中，如何定义“回答完整性”可能存在更高的专业门槛。

title: AILS-NTUA at SemEval-2026 Task 8: Evaluating Multi-Turn RAG Conversations
abstract: We present the AILS-NTUA system for SemEval-2026 Task 8 (MTRAGEval), addressing all three subtasks of multi-turn retrieval-augmented generation: passage retrieval (A), reference-grounded response generation (B), and end-to-end RAG (C). Our unified architecture is built on two principles: (i) a query-diversity-over-retriever-diversity strategy, where five complementary LLM-based query reformulations are issued to a single corpus-aligned sparse retriever and fused via variance-aware nested Reciprocal Rank Fusion; and (ii) a multistage generation pipeline that decomposes grounded generation into evidence span extraction, dual-candidate drafting, and calibrated multi-judge selection. Our system ranks 1st in Task A (nDCG@5: 0.5776, +20.5% over the strongest baseline) and 2nd in Task B (HM: 0.7698). Empirical analysis shows that query diversity over a well-aligned retriever outperforms heterogeneous retriever ensembling, and that answerability calibration-rather than retrieval coverage-is the primary bottleneck in end-to-end performance.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 AILS-NTUA 系统在 SemEval-2026 任务 8（MTRAGEval）中的实现，该任务聚焦于多轮检索增强生成（RAG）的三个子任务：段落检索（A）、基于参考的响应生成（B）及端到端 RAG（C）。该系统基于两大核心原则构建：其一，采用“查询多样性优于检索器多样性”策略，利用 5 种互补的 LLM 查询重构技术配合单一语料库对齐的稀疏检索器，并通过方差感知嵌套倒数排名融合（RRF）进行整合；其二，构建多阶段生成流水线，将生成过程分解为证据片段提取、双候选草拟及校准多评判选择。实验结果显示，该系统在任务 A 中排名第一（nDCG@5 为 0.5776，较强基准提升 20.5%），在任务 B 中排名第二（HM 为 0.7698）。分析表明，在对齐良好的检索器上增加查询多样性优于异构检索器集成，且“可回答性校准”是端到端性能的主要瓶颈。
why_it_matters: 这篇工作偏基础模型/Agent方向，可能影响病原检测任务的建模上限，值得关注其任务定义与评测设计。
analysis_zh:
## 核心内容
该研究开发了 AILS-NTUA 系统，专门用于解决多轮对话环境下的检索增强生成（RAG）难题。核心贡献在于提出了一种通过 LLM 进行多维度查询重构（Query Reformulation）并结合方差感知 RRF 融合的检索框架，以及一个包含证据提取和多评判校准的生成流水线。

## 为什么相关
本研究属于 AI/Agent 基础技术领域，与病原检测或临床微生物学的直接相关性较弱（弱 AI 交叉）。但其技术框架对于构建临床决策支持系统具有参考价值，特别是在处理复杂的、涉及多轮追问的临床指南检索或病原体基因组文献挖掘任务时，能够提高检索的精准度和生成回复的证据可靠性。

## 新颖度判断
新颖度中等。其创新点不在于提出全新的模型架构，而在于对 RAG 流程的工程优化：一是证明了在单一高性能检索器上进行多查询扩展优于多个不同检索器的简单堆叠；二是引入了“方差感知嵌套 RRF”来处理多轮对话中的查询漂移问题。

## 方法与证据
- **检索策略**：使用 5 种基于 LLM 的互补查询重构方法，配合稀疏检索器。在任务 A 中，nDCG@5 达到 0.5776，比最强基准高出 20.5%。
- **生成流水线**：采用多阶段法，包括证据片段提取、双候选草拟和校准多评判选择。在任务 B 中，HM 指标为 0.7698，位列第二。
- **关键结论**：通过实证分析发现，端到端 RAG 的瓶颈在于“可回答性校准”（即判断现有检索结果是否足以回答问题），而非单纯的检索覆盖率。

## 应用价值
该系统的方法论可直接移植到医学知识库问答 Agent 中。例如，在处理复杂的病原学诊断咨询时，通过多维度重构临床医生的提问，可以更准确地从海量基因组数据库或临床案例库中提取关键证据，并减少 LLM 产生幻觉的风险。

## 局限与风险
- **计算开销**：摘要提到使用了 5 种 LLM 重构和多阶段生成，这在实时临床诊断场景下可能带来较高的推理延迟和计算成本。
- **端到端瓶颈**：研究明确指出“可回答性校准”是主要瓶颈，这意味着在检索信息不足时，系统仍可能难以给出准确的拒绝回答或补充提问，存在误导临床决策的潜在风险。
- **数据局限**：摘要未说明其在医学或生物信息学专用语料库上的表现，其通用性有待验证。

title: Context Before Code: An Experience Report on Vibe Coding in Practice
abstract: Code-generating tools are increasingly used in software development, yet experience reports on conversational "vibe coding" under production constraints remain limited. This paper presents an experience report from a small full-stack team that applied contextual prompting and explicit architectural constraints to build (i) a multi-project agent learning platform designed for sustained, production-oriented use and (ii) an academic retrieval-augmented generation system. The agent platform supports multiple isolated projects, each with structured memory and background processing, thereby enforcing project-level isolation. The RAG system provides citation-grounded answers, role-based access control, and evaluation tracking. Across both systems, vibe coding accelerated scaffolding and integration. However, the generated code often under-specified isolation rules and infrastructure constraints when these were not explicitly defined. Consequently, aspects such as multi-tenancy, access control, memory policies, and asynchronous processing required deliberate architectural design and verification. We observe a shift in engineering effort from boilerplate implementation toward constraint specification and enforcement auditing. We also identify recurring architectural "non-delegation zones" where conversational code generation remains insufficient for production reliability.
abstract_zh: 随着代码生成工具在软件开发中的普及，关于生产环境下对话式“氛围编程”（vibe coding）的实践报告仍较少。本文介绍了一个小型全栈团队的经验，通过应用上下文提示和显式架构约束，构建了两个系统：(i) 一个面向持续生产使用的多项目智能体（Agent）学习平台，支持具有结构化记忆和后台处理的隔离项目；(ii) 一个学术检索增强生成（RAG）系统，提供带引用的回答、基于角色的访问控制（RBAC）和评估跟踪。结果显示，氛围编程显著加速了系统脚手架搭建和集成过程。然而，在未明确定义约束时，生成的代码在隔离规则和基础设施约束方面表现不足。因此，多租户、访问控制、记忆策略和异步处理仍需刻意的架构设计与验证。研究发现，工程重心已从样板代码实现转向约束规范和执行审计，并识别出对话式代码生成在生产可靠性方面尚无法胜任的“不可委派区域”。
why_it_matters: 这篇工作偏基础模型/Agent方向，可能影响病原检测任务的建模上限，值得关注其任务定义与评测设计。
analysis_zh:
## 核心内容
该研究是一篇关于“氛围编程”（Vibe Coding，即基于对话的感性编程）在生产环境下的实践报告。研究团队通过 LLM 构建了两个复杂系统：一个具备结构化记忆和项目隔离功能的“多项目智能体学习平台”，以及一个具备引用溯源和权限控制（RBAC）的“学术 RAG 系统”。研究重点探讨了如何通过上下文提示和架构约束来弥补 AI 生成代码在复杂逻辑上的不足。

## 为什么相关
在病原生信和临床微生物学领域，构建自动化的数据分析 Pipeline 或临床决策支持 Agent 已成为趋势。本文提到的“多项目隔离”、“结构化记忆”以及“RAG 系统的引用溯源”是构建高可靠生物信息工具的核心组件。了解 AI 在处理这些复杂架构约束时的局限性，有助于研究人员在开发病原检测 Agent 时避免安全和逻辑漏洞。

## 新颖度判断
**中等偏高（5.25）**。该研究并非单纯讨论代码生成效率，而是首次系统性地提出了“不可委派区域”（non-delegation zones）的概念，并量化了从“编写代码”向“约束规范与审计”的工程重心转移，这为 Agent 辅助的科研软件开发提供了新的方法论框架。

## 方法与证据
研究采用了案例研究法，通过两个具体项目进行验证：
1. **智能体平台**：实现了多项目隔离、结构化记忆和异步后台处理。
2. **RAG 系统**：集成了引用追踪、RBAC 访问控制和评估指标。 
**证据显示**：虽然 AI 加速了基础代码（Scaffolding）的编写，但在多租户隔离、访问控制策略和异步处理等关键环节，生成的代码经常出现“欠定义”现象，必须由人工进行显式的架构设计和验证。

## 应用价值
对于开发病原基因组分析平台的工程师具有直接指导意义。它指出了在利用 LLM 开发工具时，不能完全依赖 AI 生成业务逻辑，必须在“多租户数据隔离”（防止样本交叉污染）和“权限控制”（保护患者隐私）等核心模块上保留人工审计和硬性架构约束。

## 局限与风险
**弱 AI 交叉**：本文属于软件工程与 AI 的交叉，而非直接的生物医学应用。其局限性在于：实验基于小型团队，结论可能受限于特定 LLM 模型的能力；摘要未说明具体的模型版本（如 GPT-4 或 Claude 3）；此外，识别出的“不可委派区域”可能随着模型推理能力的提升而发生动态变化。

title: Learning Adaptive Force Control for Contact-Rich Sample Scraping with Heterogeneous Materials
abstract: The increasing demand for accelerated scientific discovery, driven by global challenges, highlights the need for advanced AI-driven robotics. Deploying robotic chemists in human-centric labs is key for the next horizon of autonomous discovery, as complex tasks still demand the dexterity of human scientists. Robotic manipulation in this context is uniquely challenged by handling diverse chemicals (granular, powdery, or viscous liquids), under varying lab conditions. For example, humans use spatulas for scraping materials from vial walls. Automating this process is challenging because it goes beyond simple robotic insertion tasks and traditional lab automation, requiring the execution of fine-granular movements within a constrained environment (the sample vial). Our work proposes an adaptive control framework to address this, relying on a low-level Cartesian impedance controller for stable and compliant physical interaction and a high-level reinforcement learning agent that learns to dynamically adjust interaction forces at the end-effector. The agent is guided by perception feedback, which provides the material's location. We first created a task-representative simulation environment with a Franka Research 3 robot, a scraping tool, and a sample vial containing heterogeneous materials. To facilitate the learning of an adaptive policy and model diverse characteristics, the sample is modelled as a collection of spheres, where each sphere is assigned a unique dislodgement force threshold, which is procedurally generated using Perlin noise. We train an agent to autonomously learn and adapt the optimal contact wrench for a sample scraping task in simulation and then successfully transfer this policy to a real robotic setup. Our method was evaluated across five different material setups, outperforming a fixed-wrench baseline by an average of 10.9%.
abstract_zh: 针对全球挑战对加速科学发现的需求，本研究提出了一种自适应力控框架，旨在解决机器人化学家在实验室环境中处理多样化化学物质（如颗粒、粉末或粘性液体）时的操作难题。研究重点在于自动化执行从试剂瓶壁刮取样本这一精细任务。该框架结合了用于稳定物理交互的底层笛卡尔阻抗控制器，以及根据感知反馈动态调整末端执行器交互力的上层强化学习（RL）智能体。研究者利用 Franka Research 3 机器人构建了仿真环境，并将异质材料建模为具有不同剥离力阈值的球体集合，通过 Perlin 噪声模拟材料的多样性。实验表明，该智能体能自主学习并适应最优接触力矩，并成功从仿真迁移至真实机器人。在五种不同材料设置的评估中，该方法比固定力矩基准方案的性能平均提升了 10.9%，为自主实验室中的样本处理提供了有效手段。
why_it_matters: 这篇工作更像方法创新，可能直接关联 metagenomics、long-read 或 pathogen identification 流程优化。
analysis_zh:
## 核心内容
该研究开发了一种基于强化学习（RL）的自适应力控系统，专门用于机器人自动化刮取试剂瓶内壁的异质样本（如粉末、粘性液体）。系统采用双层架构：底层通过笛卡尔阻抗控制确保物理接触的稳定性，高层 RL 智能体则根据视觉感知反馈实时调节末端执行器的接触力矩（Wrench）。

## 为什么相关
在病原微生物检测、元基因组学及蛋白质组学流程中，样本的前处理（如从采样管中提取粘稠分泌物或刮取干燥菌落）往往是自动化程度最低、最依赖人工经验的环节。该技术直接关联到实验室自动化（Lab Automation）的底层操作，是实现高通量、无人化样本制备的关键技术支撑。

## 新颖度判断
新颖度中等（0.25）。其创新点在于将复杂的材料特性（异质性）通过 Perlin 噪声建模为具有差异化剥离力阈值的球体集合，并利用 RL 解决传统固定力控无法应对的变物理特性样本刮取问题。但在 AI 算法层面，仍属于经典的强化学习与阻抗控制结合的应用范畴。

## 方法与证据
- **实验对象**：Franka Research 3 机器人、定制刮刀及装有模拟异质材料的试剂瓶。
- **数据与模型**：在仿真中通过 Perlin 噪声程序化生成材料属性；使用 RL 智能体学习动态力矩策略。
- **评价指标**：在 5 种不同材料设置下进行测试，对比固定力矩（Fixed-wrench）基准方法，该方法在样本刮取效率/成功率上平均提升了 10.9%。
- **验证环境**：完成了从仿真到真实环境（Sim-to-Real）的迁移验证。

## 应用价值
该方法可集成于“机器人化学家”或自动化核酸提取工作站，用于处理临床微生物样本中常见的粘稠、结块或附着力强的复杂检材。它能减少人工操作带来的生物安全风险，并提高样本回收的一致性，对长读长测序（Long-read）等对样本完整性要求高的流程具有潜在优化作用。

## 局限与风险
- **建模简化**：摘要提到将材料建模为“球体集合”，这与真实的生物样本（如痰液、组织碎块）的流变学特性仍有较大差距。
- **环境受限**：任务局限于试剂瓶（Vial）这一受限空间，对于更复杂的采样容器适配性未说明。
- **AI 交叉强度**：属于典型的机器人控制 AI，而非大语言模型（LLM）或生物信息学算法交叉，对后端数据分析无直接贡献。
